entries.statement: The source-domain classes and revision rules are those of Reasoning Domain Specification v1.0.
An IRD process presentation and reasoning episode are defined by IRD-001.
The first representation theorem quantifies over S_core not all S_IRD.
Every S_core episode has finite explicit material carrier sets.
S_core dynamics grounds support and material history are explicit and finite or finite-support.
A theorem-facing FARA package is A=(U,Pi,R,Rep,S,I,Inv,C,Sigma,Theta,H,Omega,Res,Prov).
Canonical FARA meanings are imported from the definitions and FARA v1.0.
A representation witness is W=(E,D,M,iota,kappa).
PB-001 P1-P7 supply provisional internal preservation obligations.
entries.nonclaim: PB-001 sufficiency and independence are not established

entries.statement: P8 uses split mode: Pres_8I is internal to Faithful_split and Corr_8E is a separate process-to-presentation correspondence obligation.
Pres_i requires admissible target-only recovery and a total typed strong embedding preserving and reflecting material relations and attributes.
Faithful_split combines the frozen P1-P7 semantics Pres_8I semantic agreement coherence uniformity compositionality machinery accounting and nontriviality.
A theorem about a mathematical presentation does not itself establish correspondence to an actual process.
Application to an actual process requires Corr_8E at an appropriate evidence grade.
Construction and recovery are uniform and source-specific machinery is counted.
Label-only lookup opaque-state hidden-interpreter metadata-smuggling evaluator-repair history-erasure evidential-upgrade and incoherent encodings are inadmissible.
One fixed FARA interface and uniform construction is eligible for every S_core source object.
Every S_core source object admits a Faithful_split witness.
The finite-core result may extend to S_IRD.
The reconstruction class for primitive necessity is undefined.
The candidate universe equivalence relation and cost preorder are undefined.
No axiom asserting FARA adequacy PB-001 completeness primitive necessity or universal reasoning structure is accepted.

open_items: W3.5-SDG-001 baseline factorization corpus specificity ablation reconstruction cost and claim-impact evidence
candidate universe and equivalence relation for minimality
nonclaims: the premises are true of every actual reasoning process
W0 through W4 proves a target representation theorem
